title: dryopteris protensa
intro: Dryopteris protensa, also known as the Autumn fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris protensa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
